title: Zoho ManageEngine ADSelfService Plus Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
summary: Zoho ManageEngine ADSelfService Plus contains an authentication bypass vulnerability affecting the REST API URLs which allow for remote code execution.

title: tmp has Path Traversal via unsanitized prefix/postfix that enables directory escape
summary: ### Summary The tmp npm package contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows escaping the intended temporary directory when untrusted data flows into the `prefix`, `postfix`, or `dir` options. title: @hapi/content header parser has a parameter smuggling issue that allows upload-filter bypass via duplicate parameters
summary: ### Impact The two parsers resolved duplicates inconsistently and silently: - `Content.disposition()` retained the last occurrence of each parameter. - `Content.type()` retained the first occurrence of charset and boundary. title: @hapi/wreck leaks sensitive `Proxy-Authorization` header across cross-hostname redirects
summary: ### Impact When `@hapi/wreck` follows a 3xx redirect to a different hostname, only the `Authorization` and `Cookie` headers are stripped. The standard credential header `Proxy-Authorization` is forwarded intact to the redirect target, potentially exposing forward-proxy credentials to a host outside the original trust boundary. title: A broken access control issue has been identified in the Talend Administration Center, that allows a user with…

title: Pimcore Vulnerable to SQL Injection in Custom Reports Column Configuration
summary: ### Summary The columnConfigAction endpoint in the CustomReportsBundle is vulnerable to SQL injection. An attacker with the reports_config permission can supply a malicious SQL configuration that is concatenated into a query and executed. safe_proof_hint: Use bounded boolean/time-free controls or synthetic data only; no dumping or broad extraction.
